name: savecompat-current
description: Deterministic A/START title/intro taps (shared with title-progression) reaching the save-menu entry point with no further input. For a CURRENT SRAM image the compat gate must never activate, so the normal save menu is reached directly -- checkpointed here purely via framebuffer/sram_hash (no raw EWRAM probes, since diagnostic-global addresses are not stable across build configs/ABIs).
